title: Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Bowl with Limey Coriander Rice
summary: Take your Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Curry batch to the next level with our zingy and herby rice, plus pickled and crunchy onions. It's delish.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Curry batch recipe.
Finely slice the red onion, then zest and juice the lime. toss the onion in ½ the lime juice, sugar, a pinch of salt. Let that pickle while everything else comes together.

Roughly chop the coriander and zest the lime. Reheat the rice according to package instructions and mix through the coriander, lime zest and a squeeze of juice. Taste and adjust with more salt or lime if needed — it should be punchy and fresh.

Warm up your creamy halloumi batch gently in a pan or microwave, just until loosened and warm. Pile the lime and coriander rice into bowls. Spoon over the quick-pickled onion, scatter with crispy onions and extra coriander, if you like.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
